title: Energy dissipation and self-similar solutions for an unforced inviscid   dyadic model
comment: 30 pages, submitted to Trans. Amer. Math. Soc
summary:
A shell-type model of an inviscid fluid, previously considered in the
literature, is investigated in absence of external force. Energy dissipation of
positive solutions is proved and decay of energy like $t^{-2}$ is established.
Self-similar decaying positive solutions are introduced and proved to exist and
classified. Coalescence and blow-up are obtained as a consequence, in the class
of arbitrary sign solutions.

title: On a Structure of the Set of Differential Games Values
summary:
In this paper the set of value functions of all-possible zero-sum
differential games with terminal payoff is characterized. The necessary and
sufficient condition for a given function to be a value of some differential
game with terminal payoff is obtained.
